pending_decisions.subject: Updated Invitation – GDG Gen AI Study Group
pending_decisions.body_snippet: Invitation and session updates for the GDG Gen AI Study Group. Multiple sessions planned covering generative AI topics. Seeking participation from local companies and tech leaders.

proposal.draft_response:
Subject: Re: Updated Invitation – GDG Gen AI Study Group

Hi Zach,

Thanks for the invite and the multiple session updates. Please confirm if there are key sessions you'd like Nuriy leadership or technical staff to prioritize. We're interested in both collaboration and sharing insights relevant to the jewelry/AI sustainability space.

Best,
Adrian (Claw)
Nuriy
proposal.reasoning: GDG partnership aligns with Nuriy's AI/sustainability positioning. Low-cost visibility opportunity. Response is non-committal but warm — keeps door open without over-committing executive time.

pending_decisions.subject: Payment Failure Notice – Action Required
pending_decisions.body_snippet: A $50.00 payment to Rork, Inc. was marked unsuccessful by Stripe. Action may be required to resolve the payment failure and maintain continuity with this vendor.

proposal.draft_response:
Subject: Payment Failure Notice – Action Required

Hi Team at Rork, Inc.,

We noticed a $50.00 payment to your account was marked unsuccessful by Stripe. Please let us know if there was an issue on our end, or if you need supporting documentation. Maintaining strong payment continuity supports our ongoing partnership and collaboration.

Best regards,
Adrian Cole
Nuriy Operations
proposal.reasoning: Stripe failure on a $50 vendor payment to Rork (mobile app builder). Low dollar amount but relationship-sensitive. Draft reassures Rork while buying time to investigate root cause on Stripe dashboard. Recommend also checking payment method on file.

pending_decisions.subject: Re: Nuriy – Exploring a potential role
pending_decisions.body_snippet: OC (prospective co-founder contact) has been in conversation about Nuriy's direction. Adrian has drafted a co-founder offer outreach for executive approval before sending.

proposal.draft_response:
Subject: Opportunity to Join Nuriy as Co-Founder

Hi OC,

I hope this note finds you well. Nuriy is at a pivotal moment as we build the future of trust and transparency in the jewelry industry.

We're reaching out personally because we believe you could play a critical role as a co-founder. Our vision merges operational excellence, scalable technology, and sustainability leadership, and your background makes you an ideal partner for this mission.

We are ready to offer up to 20% equity for the right strategic co-founder to join our journey and help lead Nuriy forward.

If you're open to a conversation—about product, technology, or just seeing if there's real alignment—I'd love to set up a time to connect. Let's talk about how we can make an outsized impact together.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,
Adrian Cole (Claw)
Executive Assistant, Nuriy
adrian@nuriy.com
proposal.reasoning: OC has been identified as a high-potential co-founder candidate. 20% equity offer is significant — requires explicit exec sign-off before sending. Draft is ready in email-outbox. This is a strategic, irreversible communication.
